name: @radzor/image-generation
description: Multi-provider image generation supporting OpenAI DALL-E, Stability AI, and Replicate. Handles prompt-based generation, size options, and base64/URL output formats.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the selected provider.

inputs.name: responseFormat
inputs.description: Whether to return a URL or base64-encoded image data.

outputs.name: generationResult
outputs.description: Result containing image URL or base64 data, revised prompt, and metadata.

events.name: onGenerated
events.description: Fired when an image has been generated successfully.

actions.name: generate

params.name: prompt
params.description: Text description of the image to generate.

params.name: options
params.description: Optional overrides for size, format, and number of images.

actions.description: Generate an image from a text prompt.

actions.name: generateMultiple
actions.description: Generate multiple image variations from a single prompt.

llm.constraints: Requires API key for the selected provider. Provider rate limits apply. DALL-E 3 has content policy restrictions.
